subject: Improve UI for Media, Style, and Platform sections
body:
- Move Image Overlay section above Advanced Filters in MediaTab
- Add on/off toggle for Image Overlay (sets opacity to 0 or 50)
- Overlay type/color buttons now toggle off when clicked again
- Only show overlay controls when overlay is enabled
- Make platform categories collapsible (shows selected platform when collapsed)
- Make Typography section in Style tab collapsed by default

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
title: Improve UI for Media, Style, and Platform sections
